notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-19 (alayam.com, albiladpress.com, lloc.gov.bh): daily outdoor work ban 12:00-16:00 from June 15 to August 31 each year, run by Bahrain's Ministry of Labour under Ministerial Decision No. 5 of 2026.
Deliberately did NOT cite the specific decision number/year in published content (same lesson as midday-work-ban-kuwait) to keep content evergreen and avoid the hardcoded-year validator.

Real differentiator found: Ministry publicized a dedicated phone/WhatsApp line (17873921, 7am-4pm daily) for the public to report violations — a genuinely useful practical detail absent from standard news coverage.
Single-country event (_countryCode: bh), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
core.type is 'fixed' anchored to June 15 (start date); August 31 end date covered in FAQ/aboutEvent/schemaData.endDate.
